name: @cedoor/squid
description: Browser FHE client and Node evaluator over Squid. `@cedoor/squid/client` uses wasm; `@cedoor/squid/server` uses a napi-rs native addon.

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build ../../crates/squid-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../packages/squid-js/wasm --out-name squid_wasm && node -e "try { require('fs').unlinkSync('wasm/.gitignore'); } catch (e) { if (e.code !== 'ENOENT') throw e; }"
scripts.build:napi: napi build --cargo-cwd ../../crates/squid-napi --platform --release --js index.js --dts index.d.ts napi && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('napi/package.json', '{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}\n')"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:napi && pnpm run build:ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:squid:linux
